name: Michael
bio:
High-Ranking Heavenly Warrior who joined the Spirit Heroes Faction for his dedication to justice and longing for light. He protects the world from the corruption of dark forces.

Role: Powerful Damage Dealer
Specialty: A backline Breakthrough-type hero that can deal massive damage to enemies; its Ultimate also deals extremely high True Damage to a single target.

skillSlots.name: Purifying Lightstrike
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemy targets for a total of 600% M.DMG (each hero takes no more than 3× Caster's ATK), with a 30% chance to apply 1 stack of [Holy Seal].

skillSlots.name: Sheen Verdict
skillSlots.description: Dispels 4 Buffs from a single enemy target with 100% chance to apply 1 stack of [Holy Seal], then deals 400% ATK as M.DMG to that target.

effects.name: Ascent to Divinity
effects.description: Gains 1 stack of [Apotheosis] for each enemy that has been applied [Holy Seal] (max 1 trigger per character per turn).

effects.name: Ascent to Divinity
effects.description: [Sheen Verdict] deals 40% extra True DMG per Buff dispelled.

effects.name: Ascent to Divinity
effects.description: Immediately refreshes all skill cooldowns when [Apotheosis] reaches 25 stacks.

effects.name: Ascent to Divinity
effects.description: [Sheen Verdict] deals extra True DMG equal to 20% + 1%*[Ascend to Godhood] stacks of target's Max HP (max 8x Caster's ATK).
